label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Partnership as it appears on the record of the Secretary of State)
rationale: Current legal name of the LP being restated. Narrow left-aligned widget at top of page (y=572, width 262pt) — the 'as on record' line at the form header.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the limited partnership has been changed to (if no change, so indicate):
rationale: New name of the LP after restatement. If no name change, filer writes 'no change' or repeats the current name.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date of filing of the initial certificate of limited partnership was
rationale: Date the original (pre-restatement) certificate of LP was filed with SOS — anchors the restatement to the original filing per §1322.5.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The street and mailing address of the limited partnership's designated office shall be: (physical location – street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical address of the designated office. NOTE: form visually shows TWO underlines under THIRD (physical + mailing) but widgets.json contains only ONE widget — the mailing-address blank is missing from the AcroForm (template gap; see open_questions).
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; enum_select value 'commercial'.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; enum_select value 'noncommercial'.
Full-width name line for the commercial-RA path (y=230). Same canonical key as Text8 (filer uses one based on RA type).
Full-width name line for the noncommercial-RA path (y=170). Same canonical key as Text7.

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line concatenated physical address of the registered agent (no P.O. Box). y=134.
Optional single-line mailing address of the registered agent. y=99 (bottom of page).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Commercial Registered Agent — CRA Public Number:
rationale: Right-aligned narrow field on the Commercial-Registered-Agent row (y=255, x=449-545, width 96pt). Required only when registered_agent.type='commercial'.

label_verbatim: [ ] Names and addresses of additional general partners are attached as Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof.
rationale: Boolean opt-in for additional-GP exhibit. The inline 'Exhibit ___' letter blank is visible on the page but missing from the AcroForm (template gap; see open_questions).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: Check only if applicable [ ] The limited partnership is a limited liability limited partnership.
rationale: Boolean elect-in for LLLP status. If checked, entity.new_name must contain 'L.L.L.P.', 'LLLP', or 'Limited Liability Limited Partnership' and cannot use 'L.P.' or 'LP' (per 31 MRSA §1308.1.A.3).

label_verbatim: EIGHTH: This is a professional limited liability limited partnership* formed pursuant to 31 MRSA §1354.4 to provide the following professional services: (type of professional services) — line 1
rationale: Professional-services description line 1. Full-page-width widget (y=356, x=106-572) parallel to MLPA-6's Text16. Filler concatenates with line 2 (Text21). Drafter mis-mapped this to general_partner.additional_exhibit_letter; correct mapping per critique is the EIGHTH professional-services free-text.
